name: At The End Of The Corridor Of the Dungeon
description:
You are at the end of this corridor, this place is getting colder, and 
darker. This place makes you shake, because you fill that you have lost
all you magic power, as well of the power of your wands and scrolls. In
fromt of you and at your sides there are cells, if you where inteligent
you would lived them close.
